request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our allies too. While some claim we're isolating ourselves, the truth is we're building a more resilient network. Remember the 2024 cyber attacks that crippled European infrastructure? Those happened because of over-reliance on foreign tech. We can't afford to be vulnerable again. #NationalSecurityFirst #StrongerTogether
